aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
   - **Driver:** `radiator_valve`
   - **Issue Link:** [Device Request - Shenzen New Green Energy Technologies Co. Ltd](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)
   - **Status:** Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **Soil Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_oitavov2`
   - **Driver:** `soil_sensor`
   - **Issue Link:** [Unable to connect](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/172)
   - **Status:** Closed

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.
